news.headline: Dutch PM Schoof Says He Won't Be Premier A Second Time
SWISS NATIONAL BANK: SUPPORTS GOV'T PROPOSALS FOR REGULATING BIG BANKS

news.summary: Athens, Greece, June 06, 2025 - Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX), a leading global shipping company specializing in dry bulk vessels, has revealed a new time charter agreement for its Ice Class Panamax dry bulk vessel, the m/v Atalandi. The deal, facilitated through a wholly-owned subsidiary, is with Stone Shipping Ltd. The contract entails a gross charter rate of US$9,000 per day for the initial 35 days and US$10,100 per day thereafter, excluding a 5.00% commission to third parties. This agreement is set to last from June 9, 2025, until at least June 15, 2026, with a potential extension until August 15, 2026.
news.headline: Diana Shipping Inc. to charter m/v Atalandi to Stone Shipping Ltd. for $9,000/day for 35 days, then $10,100/day till August 15, 2026.

news.summary: Renowned physician Dr. Howard Grossman has been appointed as the new director at Spectrum Medical Care Center in Phoenix. He is celebrated for his pioneering work in HIV care, championing equitable healthcare for the LGBTQ+ community, and his extensive clinical expertise and leadership. Dr. Grossman's appointment signifies a significant milestone in the medical field, with his years of experience and dedication to advancing healthcare for all.
news.headline: Spectrum Medical appoints LGBTQ+ pioneer Howard Grossman, M.D. as new Medical Director for HIV care and equitable healthcare.

news.summary: Broadcom Inc (NASDAQ: AVGO) posted strong second-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations. The company's second-quarter revenue stood at $15 billion, exceeding the anticipated $14.99 billion. Adjusted earnings per share for the same period were reported at $1.58, beating the projected $1.56 per share. Notably, Q2 AI revenue notably increased by 46% year-over-year, amounting to over $4.4 billion, propelled by the high demand for AI networking. Moving forward, Broadcom anticipates continued growth in AI semiconductor revenue, projecting a rise to $5.1 billion in Q3, thus marking ten consecutive quarters of growth. This expansion is expected to be driven by the company's hyperscale partners. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Analysts increase forecasts for Broadcom post impressive Q2 results; Revenue at $15 billion, beating estimates by $10 million; Adjusted earnings at $1.58 per share, surpassing estimates by $0.02.

news.summary: Iron Mountain and Information Systems Resources are offering complimentary document shredding and electronics recycling services at Comerica's Great Lakes Campus in Detroit. The event is scheduled for June 6, 2025. Comerica Bank invites individuals to bring their paper documents as well as computer equipment and accessories for disposal. This initiative aims to promote responsible waste management by providing a convenient and eco-friendly solution.
news.headline: Comerica Bank's Metro Detroit Shred Day offers free shredding & recycling on June 14 at Great Lakes Campus.

news.summary: Renowned beauty brand Charlotte Tilbury has exciting news to share as they announce a groundbreaking partnership with the iconic Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders (DCC). Serving as the official beauty partner of the DCC, Charlotte Tilbury will infuse its signature confidence-boosting magic and unparalleled Tilbury feeling into the beloved American franchise. This collaboration aims to bring a sense of empowerment and glamour to the DCC, with the partnership set to reach a global audience of fans.
news.headline: New partnership: Charlotte Tilbury teams with Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders for beauty deal, boosting confidence globally.

news.summary: In Latin America, crypto adoption is rapidly increasing, with on-chain value reaching $415 billion in 2024, a 42.5% year-over-year increase, making it the second-fastest-growing crypto market globally. By early 2025, there were an estimated 55 million crypto users in the region, with 95% planning to further expand their exposure in the same year. Stablecoins play a central role in crypto usage in Latin America, with 90% of crypto flows in Brazil associated with stablecoins, primarily used for remittances and inflation hedging. Regulatory efforts are also underway, with Brazil focusing on stablecoin oversight and licensing frameworks, while piloting its Drex central bank digital currency (CBDC). Argentina launched a national registry for virtual asset service providers (VASPs) in 2024 to improve transparency and comply with FATF guidelines. However, despite the growing crypto ecosystem, three-quarters of Latin American crypto media outlets saw a decline in traffic between January and March 2025. The report raises questions about the reasons for this trend and aims to understand the disconnect between the growth of crypto and the struggles of media outlets meant to support it.
news.headline: LATAM crypto media traffic decreased in Q1 2025 despite rising adoption. $415 billion on-chain value in 2024, 55 million users, 95% planning to grow exposure. 90% of Brazil's crypto flows linked to stablecoins. Regulatory efforts increasing in Brazil and Argentina. 75% of LATAM outlets saw declining traffic in Q1 2025. Why are media outlets struggling as crypto adoption grows in the region?

news.summary: An advertising campaign showcasing the 2025 Hyundai Santa Fe Hybrid and Tucson Hybrid is emphasizing how these models serve as a bridge between gasoline and electric vehicles, providing enhanced fuel efficiency, lower emissions, and superior performance. The campaign also underscores Hyundai's dedication to community growth, with the commercials filmed in Paris, Texas.
news.headline: French cowboy promotes Hyundai's hybrid vehicles in Texas, emphasizing fuel efficiency&performance. Ads filmed in Paris, Texas.

news.summary: Important presentations will cover updates from a phase 3 trial investigating Mim8 (denecimig) treatment and five assessments of treatment outcomes with concizumab in hemophilia A. Additionally, the FRONTIER5 trial will analyze the safety of transitioning directly from emicizumab.
news.headline: Novo Nordisk to present phase 3 trials at ISTH 2025 for hemophilia treatment. Includes Mim8 updates and safety analysis.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that around 500 individuals were affected by the data breach that occurred last week. The breach exposed sensitive information, including email addresses and passwords, of approximately 300 customers. The company has stated that they are working closely with cybersecurity experts to investigate the incident and enhance their security measures. They have also emphasized the importance of regularly updating passwords and being cautious of any suspicious emails or activities.Affected customers have been advised to change their passwords immediately and monitor their accounts for any unauthorized activity. The company has apologized for the breach and assured customers that they are taking steps to prevent such incidents in the future.
news.headline: Record US household debt levels have reached new highs. Are you feeling the financial strain? #debt #economy
SNB President Schlegel: SNB Supports Government's Banking Stability Proposals

news.summary: The conflict between Elon Musk and Donald Trump led to the creation of a meme coin on Solana called "Kill Big Beautiful Bill" (KBBB), following Musk's criticism of Trump's "Big Beautiful Bill." The coin quickly gained traction in the crypto community, reaching a market capitalization of $53.1 million in just nine hours. This surge in valuation exemplifies the ongoing trend of meme coin frenzies, with KBBB being the latest addition fueled by a political dispute. The coin's name is a play on Musk's "Kill Bill" poster meme shared on X on June 5. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Musk-Trump feud leads to $50M meme coin "Kill Big Beautiful Bill" on Solana, warning to avoid it.

news.summary: In Toronto, Li-Cycle Holdings Corp. (OTC Pink Markets: LICYQ), a prominent global lithium-ion battery resource recovery entity, revealed that on June 5, 2025, after market closure, the Company was issued a cease trade order ("CTO") by the Ontario Securities Commission ("OSC"). This action was taken due to the Company's non-compliance with Ontario securities regulations regarding the submission of required periodic disclosures, such as interim financial statements. This development has impacted the trading status of Li-Cycle Holdings Corp.
news.headline: Li-Cycle Holdings Corp. (LICYQ) receives a cease trade order from OSC due to failure to file required disclosures.

news.summary: The latest service provider to enter the market since mid-2024 will be introducing SuperCom's Electronic Monitoring technology in two states - Florida and Mississippi. This marks the 9th new service provider to emerge in the industry. SuperCom, a renowned global provider specializing in secured solutions for e-Government, IoT, and various sectors, will be at the forefront of this expansion. The development was announced on June 6, 2025, in TEL AVIV, Israel. SuperCom is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SPCB.
news.headline: SuperCom signs contract with 9th service provider since mid-2024 to introduce technology in Florida and Mississippi.

news.summary: Evidence of a weakening labor market was evident on Wednesday as private-sector job growth in the U.S. dropped to a more than two-year low, raising concerns among investors about the impact of trade tensions. There were only 37,000 jobs added by private employers in May, a significant decrease from the 62,000 jobs added in April. This figure fell well below economists' expectations of 115,000 and represented the lowest level since March 2023, as per the Automatic Data Processing Inc. National Employment report. President Donald Trump used this data to pressure the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates, citing that Europe has already done so nine times. Trump's reaction was posted on Truth social, criticizing Fed Chair Powell for not acting sooner.
news.headline: US private sector hiring slows dramatically, as only 37,000 jobs added in May, down from 62,000 in April, lowest since March 2023. Trump urges Fed to lower rates.

news.summary: The article discusses the evolution of the decentralized, permissionless currency project Circles, which began in 2020 with the aim of providing universal basic access to digital cash for the de-banked and financially marginalized. However, the initial version did not gain widespread adoption. Now, Circles is back with V2, which promises better value and a stronger economic model. Co-founder Martin Köppelmann highlighted the project's goal of delivering crypto's benefits to the masses and creating a more fair distribution system in comparison to Bitcoin, which mainly profits early adopters. Circles V2, part of the Gnosis Chain project, enables users to mint one Circles (CRC) token per hour, regardless of current holdings, promoting a more democratic money system. This system aims to make money work better and benefit a broader population.
news.headline: Circles aims to return crypto to egalitarian roots, launching V2 offering better value. Every user can mint one Circle (CRC) per hour, aiming for fairer distribution.
Elon Musk and Donald Trump could reconcile, reports suggest.

news.summary: Stocks in the market hit significant milestones, with Nvidia entering a favorable buying range. Elon Musk, the CEO of Tesla, expressed strong disapproval of the Trump administration's budget as an abhorrent measure. CrowdStrike experienced a sharp decline towards the end of the session. Dow Jones Futures showed an upward trend, with CrowdStrike leading the initial movers. The market surpassed resistance levels, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures up, CrowdStrike leads early; Market surpasses resistance with Nvidia in buy zone.

news.summary: In Toronto, following the Ontario budget's allocation of $280 million for surgical and diagnostic test expansion in private clinics, while hospital funding is constrained, a recent poll reveals that 73% of Ontarians urge the government to prioritize investments in public healthcare. The Nanos poll, conducted in May with over 1,000 participants, delved into public opinion regarding the privatization of hospital services and perceptions of staffing levels in public hospitals.
news.headline: Ontarians prefer public hospitals over private clinics - 73% want gov investment in public health care. Poll surveyed 1000+.

news.summary: The CEO of Alpha Modus has orchestrated an equity swap that has bolstered the company's balance sheet by $31 million. This move signifies a commitment to long-term growth and enhances alignment with shareholders.
news.headline: Alpha Modus Holdings, Inc. to boost balance sheet with $31M capital restructuring led by CEO for growth and shareholder alignment.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global smartphone market experienced a decrease of 5.9% in shipments during the third quarter of this year compared to the same period last year. Approximately 326 million smartphones were shipped worldwide during this quarter. Despite this overall decline, some regions like North America and Western Europe saw growth in smartphone shipments. Samsung maintained its position as the top smartphone vendor with a market share of 21.9%, followed by Huawei, Apple, Xiaomi, and Oppo. The ongoing supply chain disruptions and component shortages continue to impact the smartphone market. Additionally, the average selling price of smartphones increased by 9% year-on-year, reaching $360. Overall, the smartphone industry is facing challenges amidst the ongoing global uncertainty.
news.headline: Kenges Rakishev and Aselle Tasmagambetova's Shoqan School makes history with a one-billion-tenge bond listing on KASE.

news.summary: In HERNDON, Virginia on June 6, 2025, ePlus Inc. (NASDAQ NGS: PLUS) was honored as Nutanix's Portfolio Partner of the Year at Nutanix Next in Washington, D.C. This esteemed recognition highlights ePlus' exceptional performance in the industry. Being distinguished as the Portfolio Partner of the Year signifies ePlus' significant contributions and success within the partnership. This recognition further solidifies ePlus' position as a top-tier partner, showcasing their commitment and expertise in the sector.
news.headline: ePlus wins Nutanix Portfolio Partner of the Year Award at Nutanix Next event in Washington, D.C. - June 6, 2025.

news.summary: This week, the president plans to increase tariffs on steel and aluminum. Meanwhile, legal challenges are being raised against other tariffs imposed by the administration.
news.headline: Trump plans to increase tariffs on steel and aluminum despite court challenges to other tariffs.

news.summary: A new Agentic AI suite called Marketing Agents has been launched by Uniphore in Palo Alto, Calif. and Denver. This suite is a first-of-its-kind for enterprise and offers natural language search, segmentation, and knowledge within the Customer Data Platform (CDP).
news.headline: Uniphore launches Marketing Agents, AI tool for marketers, offers natural language search, segmentation, knowledge in CDP.

news.summary: "Seven individuals, consisting of six lung cancer patients and one caregiver, were chosen as the first-ever LiveLung ASCO Scholars. They participated in the American Society of Clinical Oncology annual meeting held in Chicago on June 6, 2025. This program aims to provide educational opportunities for those affected by lung cancer and promote discussion on advancements in oncology. The selected individuals shared their experiences during the meeting, contributing to a broader understanding of the challenges faced by patients. The initiative signifies a meaningful step towards engaging patients in the medical community. The LiveLung ASCO Scholars program represents a unique approach to involve those directly impacted by the disease in discussions about treatment and care. By providing a platform for patients and caregivers to participate in such prominent events, the program enhances the exchange of knowledge and fosters a collaborative environment within the oncology field."
news.headline: 6 lung cancer patients and 1 care partner participate in the ASCO annual meeting in Chicago. LiveLung program.

news.summary: A recent report indicates a sharp increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the region, with a total of 2,500 new cases recorded in the past week alone. This surge brings the total number of cases in the area to 15,000, signaling a concerning trend of rising infections. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines, such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to help curb the spread of the virus. The report also highlights a rise in hospitalizations, with 300 new admissions reported in the same week, putting strain on the healthcare system. Authorities are closely monitoring the situation and considering additional measures to address the growing crisis.
news.headline: JBDI Holdings now meets Nasdaq’s minimum bid price requirement, ensuring compliance.
Venetus plans to place shares in Theon International to boost free float and stock liquidity.

news.summary: In the latest update, it was reported that the number of COVID-19 cases has reached over 5 million globally, with over 300,000 deaths confirmed. The United States has the highest number of cases, surpassing 1.5 million cases and 90,000 deaths. In Europe, the situation remains critical, with countries like Italy and Spain still facing high numbers of infections and fatalities. Several countries have begun easing lockdown restrictions, leading to concerns about a potential second wave of infections. Efforts to develop a vaccine are ongoing, with some promising results from clinical trials. Public health officials continue to emphasize the importance of precautionary measures such as social distancing and wearing masks to prevent further spread of the virus.
news.headline: YieldMax® ETFs declare distributions on various funds, including XYZY, WNTR, SMCY, AIYY, MSTY.

news.summary: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller cautioned about the possibility of tariff-induced inflation causing a temporary uptick in prices, leading to inflation peaks ranging between 3-5% in 2025. This warning was delivered during his speech at the Bank of Korea International Conference in Seoul, where he presented two potential tariff scenarios. His current base case involves a 15% trade-weighted tariff on U.S. goods imports, positioned between his previously simulated high and low tariff scenarios. Waller's stance reflects a need for trade policy clarity and economic stability before considering rate cuts later in the year. This comes in the wake of President Donald Trump's criticism of Fed Chair Jerome Powell for not implementing rate cuts, emphasizing the importance of monitoring the evolving trade dynamics closely.
news.headline: Fed's Christopher Waller warns of inflation risks from tariffs, considers rate cuts in 2025 if trade policy stabilizes. Inflation could peak at 3-5%, with a 15% trade-weighted tariff. President Trump criticizes Fed for not cutting rates. Waller presented at the Bank of Korea International Conference.

news.summary: Today, in Waltham, Mass. and Stockholm on June 6, 2025, Apellis Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: APLS) and Sobi ® (STO:SOBI) revealed fresh findings from the continual monitoring phase of the Phase 3 VALIANT study. This study was investigating the efficacy of EMPAVELI ® (pegcetacoplan) for treating C3 glomerulopathy (C3G) and primary immune complex membranoproliferative glomerulonephritis (IC-MPGN). The data was unveiled during a significant session at the European Renal Association (ERA) Congress.
news.headline: Apellis and Sobi report positive results for EMPAVELI in Phase 3 study for C3G and IC-MPGN, presented at ERA Congress.

news.summary: The anticipated market recovery following sales plummeting to a 29-year low last year has not materialized as expected.
news.headline: Housing market fails to rebound, sales hit 29-year low.
Sanofi Says Additional ALTUVIIIO Study Analysis Backs Efficacy

news.summary: The latest addition to ResearchAndMarkets.com is the database on the "United Kingdom Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio." Presently, the UK boasts a data center capacity of approximately 1.7 GW and over 10 million sq. ft. of constructed space. London stands at the forefront of the upcoming data center market in the UK, accounting for more than 60% of the total power capacity. Leading the sector in the UK is VIRTUS Data Centres, with Equinix and Digital Realty following closely. Noteworthy forthcoming projects encompass QTS, Digital Re.
news.headline: UK has 1.7 GW data center capacity with 10M sq ft built. London leads with 60% power capacity. VIRTUS top operator.

news.summary: Celebrating its 100th anniversary, Chrysler recently shared a group photo featuring over 1,500 employees to mark this milestone. Alongside this, the company has revealed plans for a series of summer events to commemorate a century of innovation. As Chrysler reflects on its past achievements, it also looks forward to the future, gearing up for the next century of growth and success. Cheers to 100 years of Chrysler!
news.headline: Chrysler celebrates 100 years with 1,500+ employee photo, plans summer events for a century of innovation. Looking to next 100 years.

news.summary: An agreement has been reached between Anax Power and Enbridge to deploy the Anax Turboexpander System at sites in Pennsylvania and Ontario, Canada. These projects will introduce a total of 1.5 megawatts (MW) of clean energy to Enbridge's network in Hamilton, Ontario, and up to 2MW in Pennsylvania. Anax Power's technology utilizes natural gas to generate power without combustion, ensuring emission-free electricity production. The partnership aims to enhance energy capacity and sustainability in these regions.
news.headline: Anax Power forms partnership with Enbridge to install 1.5MW in Hamilton and 2MW in Pennsylvania, generating clean power.

news.headline: Trump and Dogecoin prices drop after Musk criticizes the president. Meme coins tied to them also decline.

news.summary: Irvine, California - Foxx Development Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: FOXX), known for its consumer electronics and IoT solutions, revealed its inclusion in the Russell Microcap ® Index in the 2025 annual reconstitution list by FTSE Russell. As part of the telecommunications sector additions, this marks a major achievement for the Company. The updated indexes will come into effect post the U.S. market closure on June 27th.
news.headline: Foxx Development Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: FOXX) to join Russell Microcap Index, a milestone for the Company, effective June 27.

news.summary: Domo (Nasdaq: DOMO) has revealed plans to be an Icon Sponsor at the 2025 Databricks Data + AI Summit, which will be held at the Moscone Center in San Francisco from June 9-12. The event will feature showcases of Domo's AI and data products platform. In collaboration with Sol de Janeiro, a beauty brand bought by L'Occitane in 2021, Domo will highlight their partnership's impact on enhancing crucial business insights and broadening data accessibility across the organization. Attendees can expect cutting-edge presentations at the Summit.
news.headline: Domo showcasing AI and data products at 2025 Data + AI Summit in San Francisco. Sol de Janeiro to present partnership, transforming business insights.

news.summary: Know Labs, Inc., a technology company focused on non-invasive health monitoring solutions, revealed a new agreement with Goldeneye 1995 LLC to acquire a majority stake. This deal, involving NYSE American: KNW, will see Greg Kidd, an affiliate of the buyer and former Ripple Chief Risk Officer, take on the role of Chief Executive Officer. This move marks a significant transition for the company and is poised to reshape its leadership structure.
news.headline: Greg Kidd to acquire controlling interest in Know Labs, introducing Bitcoin treasury strategy. Kidd to become CEO.
